entry_criteria.scope_in: plain frozen vegetables, single-ingredient frozen vegetables, frozen vegetable mixes, frozen legumes sold as vegetables (peas, green beans, edamame, corn), frozen herbs packaged as food product with retailer evidence
entry_criteria.scope_out: frozen fruit, frozen ready meals, stir-fry kits with sauce packets, breaded/fried frozen products, frozen potatoes/fries, soup mixes positioned as prepared meal, products without retailer evidence, Open Food Facts as primary source
retailer_priority: 4. Other Israeli retailers (if useful structured product evidence)

retailer_coverage.shufersal: primary — 30 products from Shufersal online and Wolt Shufersal
retailer_coverage.rami_levi: referenced — category structure confirmed, specific products overlap with Shufersal
retailer_coverage.yohananof: limited — 1 private label product confirmed, Sanfrost overlaps
retailer_coverage.other: shoretzki.com cross-referenced for Harduf/Willy Food products

category_boundary_notes: Edamame (soybeans) included as frozen legume sold as vegetable — per scope
Artichoke hearts included as single-ingredient frozen vegetable
Frozen herbs (Dorot-style) included only when packaged as food product with retailer evidence — 3 Dorot products included
Chickpeas and white beans included as frozen legumes sold as vegetables
Corn included as frozen vegetable (sweet corn kernels)
Frozen peas and carrots mix included as vegetable mix
No stir-fry kits with sauce packets found in plain frozen vegetables — if they exist they are excluded per scope
Barcodes obtained for Sunfrost products from rabbanimarket.co.il cross-reference

sources_used: shufersal.co.il online category browse (June 2026, browsed via web search)
wolt.com Shufersal Petah Tikva storefront (June 2026, browsed via web search)
rami-levy.co.il category structure (referenced via web search)
shoretzki.com product listings (cross-reference via web search)
provenance.scrape_warning: THIS IS NOT A TRUE BSIP0 SCRAPE OUTPUT. No raw scrape artifacts exist — no HTML snapshots, no retailer API JSON, no screenshots, no scrape logs, no raw product page captures. All evidence is from manual web browsing and cross-reference searches. Every product needs retailer-verified source capture before BSIP1.
provenance.note: Manual discovery candidate set only. No nutrition panels, no ingredient lists, no OFF enrichment. Prices are as-of June 2026 and may vary by store format. Barcodes: 15/33 (45%). Product URLs: 1/33 (3%). Image URLs: 0/33 (0%). See _audit for field-by-field completeness.

recommendation_notes: BSIP0 scrape is incomplete — zero raw scrape artifacts exist
Manual discovery identified 33 promising candidates across 2 retailers (31 Shufersal, 2 Yohananof)
Category is structurally simple (single-ingredient veg, short mixes) — no fundamental barrier to BSIP1
BSIP1 must NOT proceed until actual scrape artifacts exist for the majority of candidates
Next step: Run Playwright/API scrape against Shufersal frozen vegetables category page
After scrape: verify barcodes, capture product URLs, capture image URLs, capture nutrition from retailer panels
Sunfrost barcodes (15/33) can seed the scrape; remaining 18 need barcode acquisition during scrape
No structural blockers — proceed to scrape when resources available
